nuggets.text: DeepBrain AI's Free tier includes 3 exports, videos up to 3 minutes, 1 custom avatar, 16 generative credits, and 720p export with watermark included.
Personal starts at $24 per month and includes unlimited exports, videos up to 30 minutes, 3 custom avatars, 60 generative credits, 1080p export, and no watermark.
Team starts at $55 per month for 1 seat and includes 150 generative credits, 4K export, team collaboration workspace, custom brand kit, and multi-avatar scenes.
Enterprise adds unlimited video duration, unlimited custom avatars, flexible credits, priority video processing, and enterprise-grade SAML SSO.
The pricing page lists one-click translation, proofread AI dubbing scripts, subtitle upload and download, and dubbing SRT or ASS upload on higher tiers.
DeepBrain AI positions language support at 30 plus languages on Free and 150 plus languages with 1,000 plus voices on paid plans.
The platform advertises 2,000 plus AI-generated avatars across all plans, with stock avatar counts rising from 40 plus on Free to 155 plus on Team and Enterprise.
Personal includes unlimited photo avatars, AI dubbing with SRT or ASS upload, 7,000 plus templates, 3 million plus Shutterstock images, and no watermark.
The pricing page also lists screen recording with avatar, topic-to-video, script-to-video, URL-to-video, docs-to-video, product-to-video, and bulk video generation features.
Enterprise additionally lists SCORM export, bulk video generation, 24/7 priority technical support, and a dedicated account manager.

commercialUse.value: Commercial use rights cover AI-generated avatars and voices without attribution.

usageRights.value: Pricing includes royalty-free images, videos, and music for copyright-compliant use.

refundCancellation.value: Downgrades and cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

workflowFeatureDocs.value: AI dubbing supports 150+ languages with voice cloning and lip-sync.

security.value: Enterprise plans list enterprise-grade security such as SAML SSO.

enterprise.value: Team plans add collaboration on AI video creation.
Team plans share generative credits across seats.
